name: Unnamed Project

entity_types.name: ResearchTeam
entity_types.description: A team or group within a research institution focused on AI or technology development.

attributes.name: team_name
attributes.description: The name of the research team.

attributes.name: research_focus
attributes.description: The primary research area or technology focus.

entity_types.name: University
entity_types.description: An academic institution involved in research and education.

attributes.name: university_name
attributes.description: The full name of the university.

attributes.name: location
attributes.description: The geographical location of the university.

entity_types.name: TechCompany
entity_types.description: A company that develops or provides technology products and services.

attributes.name: company_name
attributes.description: The full name of the technology company.

attributes.name: industry
attributes.description: The primary industry or sector the company operates in.

entity_types.name: MedicalCenter
entity_types.description: A healthcare institution involved in medical research and patient care.

attributes.name: center_name
attributes.description: The full name of the medical center.

attributes.name: specialization
attributes.description: The medical specialization or focus area.

entity_types.name: GovernmentAgency
entity_types.description: A government body involved in regulation, policy-making, or funding.

attributes.name: agency_name
attributes.description: The full name of the government agency.

attributes.name: jurisdiction
attributes.description: The geographical or functional jurisdiction of the agency.

entity_types.name: MediaOutlet
entity_types.description: A media organization that reports news and information.

attributes.name: outlet_name
attributes.description: The full name of the media outlet.

attributes.name: media_type
attributes.description: The type of media (e.g., newspaper, TV, online).

entity_types.name: Investor
entity_types.description: An individual or entity that invests in technology or startups.

attributes.name: investor_name
attributes.description: The full name of the investor or investment firm.

attributes.name: investment_focus
attributes.description: The primary focus area for investments.

entity_types.name: IndustryExpert
entity_types.description: An individual with expertise in AI, technology, or specific industries.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: The full name of the expert.

attributes.name: expertise_area
attributes.description: The area of expertise or specialization.

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: A natural person not fitting into more specific person types.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: The full name of the person.

attributes.name: role
attributes.description: The role or occupation of the person.

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: An organization not fitting into more specific organization types.

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: The full name of the organization.

attributes.name: description
attributes.description: A brief description of the organization's purpose.

edge_types.name: WORKS_FOR
edge_types.description: Indicates employment or affiliation with an organization.

edge_types.name: COLLABORATES_WITH
edge_types.description: Indicates collaboration between entities on projects or research.

edge_types.name: REPORTS_ON
edge_types.description: Indicates reporting or coverage of topics by media.

edge_types.name: INVESTS_IN
edge_types.description: Indicates financial investment in an entity or technology.

edge_types.name: REGULATES
edge_types.description: Indicates regulatory oversight or policy-making authority.

edge_types.name: COMMENTS_ON
edge_types.description: Indicates public commentary or opinion on topics.

edge_types.name: SUPPORTS
edge_types.description: Indicates support or endorsement of ideas or entities.

edge_types.name: RESPONDS_TO
edge_types.description: Indicates a response to statements or events.

analysis_summary: 文本内容聚焦于GraphRAG技术在AI领域的趋势分析，涉及研究团队、大学、科技公司、医疗机构等实体。基于此，设计了8个具体实体类型（如ResearchTeam、University、TechCompany等）和2个兜底类型（Person、Organization），以覆盖文本中提到的各类发声主体。关系类型反映了社交媒体上的互动，如合作、报道、投资等。
simulation_requirement: 未来三年内，生成式 AI 在临床诊断辅助领域的应用将如何发展？哪些细分方向可能最先突破？
